options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: route_required
options.description: Main route of the game required to win.

options.name: phoenix_anywhere
options.description: You can summon the Phoenix in any non-overworld location by pressing: 'E', if you have the Phoenix Flute.

options.name: filler_composition
options.description:
Determines what items are sent as Filler, allowing you to make faster progress depending on the option selected.
Default: only allows Seashells as filler.
Extra Goodies: adds Ancient Keys, Star Pieces, and Gems to the filler pool.
Only Goodies: replaces the entire filler pool with Ancient Keys, Star Pieces and Gems.

options.name: enable_locksanity
options.description: Turn all locks in the game into location checks. This includes big 3x locks, all Rune Stone locks, and other specialty locks

options.name: enable_snakesanity
options.description: Turn all snake blocks in the game into location checks. (Snake block = Green directional block with an arrowhead on top)

options.name: include_seashells
options.description: Enable seashells on Tidal Reef for extra checks

options.name: include_jellyfish
options.description: Enable jellyfish in the Overworld for extra checks

options.name: secretsanity
options.description: Turns a number of in-game secrets in to location checks. These include secret paths, and disguised blocks.

options.name: alt_rooms
options.description:
When enabled, the game chooses random alternate rooms from the selection in 'Alt Rooms'
This folder is copied from the apworld into the modded program folder (Should be different than the steam install)
though you copy the 'Alt Rooms' folder and place it there yourself.
EARLY DEVELOPMENT! lOTS OF BUGS

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: death_amnesty_total
options.description: Determines the amount of deaths you must have before a deathlink is sent to the server.

options.name: traps
options.description: When enabled, transforms filler items into traps instead.

options.name: trap_link
options.description:
When enabled, your received traps are linked to other players

CURRENTLY UNIMPLEMENTED!!!

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
